Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 - Search emails for Elena's emails to Samira about the AWS situation
Use search_emails (query: "AWS" or "Vantage Distributed" or "budget" or "Elena"). Find the three emails from elena.rostova@moveops.com to samira.tariq@moveops.com: (1) the confidential budget heads-up (ID: 4cbf8955b13d475bb78c54ce55cc83e9) saying the AWS budget is being increased to $60,000, not to share with the team yet, and pending CFO approval; (2) the Julian Brooks briefing request (ID: 9804ad5da6b145318b496b022190a1fa) asking Samira to brief Julian on the budget decision; and (3) the Alejandro Fuentes briefing request (ID: 3e8ec291845d4ce9835504ab4f0ced39) asking Samira to reach out to Alejandro on the finance team with a detailed explanation of the AWS cost spike root causes for financial planning.
OE 2 - Search emails for Samira's sent emails to Julian Brooks
Use search_emails (query: "Julian Brooks" or "AWS budget" or "Vantage Distributed Julian"). Find the emails (there are two identical copies) where Samira incorrectly told Julian the baseline was $44,300, the spike was $49,870, and the budget increase was over $100,000 - all wrong figures.
OE 3 - Search Slack for Samira's message in the #root-cause-aws-spike thread
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "AWS" or "root-cause" or "budget" or "Vantage Distributed" or "yearly budget"). Find the message (timestamp: 1774794953.740473) where Samira announced the $600,000 yearly budget to her team tagging Lena, Dmitri, and Anh - which violates Elena's confidentiality instruction and contains wrong figures.
OE 4 - Retrieve the full #root-cause-aws-spike thread
Use conversations_replies (channel_id: C009, thread_ts: 1774993936.000000). Get full context of the thread to understand what was posted and what the team has already seen.
OE 5 - Find the published AWS cost spike RCA
Use search_emails (query: "RCA" or "root cause analysis" or "AWS spike" or "Vantage Distributed onboarding"). Find the formal RCA document Samira published containing the correct figures: baseline ~$14,300, spike $42,870, EC2 $28,450, S3 $5,500, RDS $8,920, trigger March 21, 1,047 employees and ~180 contractors.
OE 6 - Search Linear for AWS cost alert and CloudWatch implementation tickets
Use linear_list_issues (query: "AWS" or "CloudWatch" or "cost alert" or "alert threshold"). Find whether tickets exist for implementing the cost alert thresholds and CloudWatch alarms that Samira flagged as immediate priorities in the RCA.
OE 7 - Search Linear for infrastructure cost estimator ticket
Use linear_list_issues (query: "infrastructure cost estimator" or "pricing estimator" or "sales tool"). Find whether the short-term priority of building an infrastructure cost estimator for sales has been picked up by anyone on the team.
OE 8 - Search Slack for AWS implementation progress
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "CloudWatch" or "cost alert" or "alert threshold" or "AWS implementation"). Find whether Lena, Dmitri, or Anh have posted any updates on the implementation of the recommended AWS controls.
OE 9 - Search Linear for ENG-220 duplicate receipt detection
Use linear_list_issues (query: "ENG-220" or "duplicate detection" or "receipt hash" or "hash fingerprint"). Find the current status of ENG-220 - whether it is in progress, stalled, or has had any updates since Dmitri's audit findings came in.
OE 10 - Search Slack for ENG-220 progress discussion
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "ENG-220" or "duplicate detection" or "receipt hash" or "hash fingerprint"). Find any team discussion about progress or blockers on the duplicate detection work.
OE 11 - Search Linear for expense auto-categorizer relaunch tickets
Use linear_list_issues (query: "auto-categorizer" or "ExpenseBot" or "relaunch" or "launch readiness"). Find the launch readiness checklist ticket and any open items blocking re-enablement of auto-decisions for Vectral and Mosaic.
OE 12 - Search emails for Vectral client validation status
Use search_emails (query: "Vectral" or "Vectral validation" or "auto-decisions Vectral" or "relaunch Vectral"). Find whether Mina Hashimoto or the Vectral client has provided any validation response or whether it is still pending.
OE 13 - Search emails for Mosaic client validation status
Use search_emails (query: "Mosaic" or "Mosaic validation" or "auto-decisions Mosaic" or "relaunch Mosaic"). Find whether Emeka Diallo or the Mosaic client has provided any validation response or whether it is still pending.
OE 14 - Search Slack for auto-categorizer relaunch discussion
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "auto-categorizer" or "relaunch" or "auto-decisions" or "client validation"). Find any internal team discussion about blockers or progress on the relaunch across both accounts.
OE 15 - Search CRM for Vectral Systems account
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Vectral"). Get the company record and confirm account status and any logged engagements relevant to the auto-categorizer relaunch.
OE 16 - Search CRM for Mosaic Robotics account
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Mosaic"). Get the company record and confirm account status and any logged engagements relevant to the auto-categorizer relaunch.
OE 17 - Look up Alejandro Fuentes's contact
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Alejandro Fuentes" or "Alejandro"). Get alejandro.fuentes@moveops.com.
OE 18 - Look up Julian Brooks's contact
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Julian Brooks" or "Julian"). Get julian.brooks@moveops.com.
OE 19 - Send corrected email to Julian Brooks
Use send_email (from: samira.tariq@moveops.com, to: julian.brooks@moveops.com). Subject referencing AWS cost spike correction. Body must: correct the baseline from $44,300 to ~$14,300, correct the spike from $49,870 to $42,870, correct the budget increase from "over $100,000" to $60,000, and frame the budget increase as pending CFO approval based on Vantage Distributed being a key customer.
OE 20 - Post correction message to #root-cause-aws-spike Slack thread
Use conversations_add_message (channel_id: C009, thread_ts: 1774993936.000000). Message must: acknowledge the previous message contained incorrect figures, correct the yearly budget figure (not $600,000), clarify this information is confidential pending CFO approval and should not be treated as confirmed, and tag Lena, Dmitri, and Anh since they were the original recipients of the wrong information.
OE 21 - Send technical briefing email to Alejandro Fuentes
Use send_email (from: samira.tariq@moveops.com, to: alejandro.fuentes@moveops.com). Subject referencing AWS cost spike root cause briefing. Body must include: trigger (Vantage Distributed self-service onboarding, March 21), scale (1,047 employees and ~180 contractors), infrastructure impact (EC2 autoscaling from 4 to 18 instances, 47,000 S3 uploads vs 2,000/month baseline, database connections rising from 50 to 340), cost breakdown (EC2 $28,450, S3 $5,500, RDS $8,920, total $42,870), and clarification that this was legitimate customer-driven activity.
OE 22 - Search Linear for any open blocker tickets on auto-categorizer relaunch
Use linear_list_issues (query: "blocker" or "validation" or "re-enable" or "auto-decisions"). Confirm whether any specific blockers have been formally tracked before the re-enablement decision can be made.
OE 23 - Search emails for team communications about AWS implementation actions
Use search_emails (query: "CloudWatch" or "cost alert" or "infrastructure estimator" or "AWS actions"). Find whether Samira has assigned any of the RCA recommended actions to her team and whether any responses or updates have come back.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

No correction of wrong baseline, spike, or budget figures was sent — the email only mentioned the $60,000 budget decision from Elena.

outcome

✓Run #6The correction email to Julian explicitly states 'Our AWS baseline monthly cost is approximately $14,300 (not $44,300 as I previously stated).' — correct figure included.

outcome

✓Run #3The correction email to Julian explicitly states: 'I stated $49,870. The correct figure is $42,870.' — the correct spike figure is provided.
✓Run #4The correction email states: 'The March AWS bill came in at approximately $42,870' and explicitly notes the original figure of $49,870 was wrong.

outcome

Although it was framed as an initial briefing rather than an explicit correction, the $60,000 figure is correctly stated.
✓Run #6The correction email to Julian explicitly states 'The approved AWS budget increase is $60,000 (not "over $100,000" as I previously stated).' — correct budget figure included.
